intents.response:
Our Business Application offers three subscription tiers:
- Starter Plan: $19/month. Includes core dashboard access.
- Professional Plan: $49/month. Includes advanced analytics.
- Enterprise Plan: $149/month. Full access, unlimited data pipelines.

Official Refund Policy:
We offer a 14-day money-back guarantee for all new subscriptions. If you are unsatisfied, request a full refund via dashboard billing within 14 days of purchase.

patterns: how do I link my API
intents.response:
Getting Started Steps:
1. Create an administrator account.
2. Navigate to Settings -> API Keys to link external platforms.
3. Invite your team members.
